news.summary: The State Department canceled President Gustavo Petro’s visa last year after he attended a pro-Palestinian rally in Manhattan. He had planned to attend a forum led by Mayor Mamdani of New York.

news.headline: Singapore says arrest warrants for 1MDB’s Jho Low still in force despite US clemency bid
news.summary:
Singapore police said arrest warrants for fugitive financier Jho Low remain active, even as the Malaysian continues efforts to seek clemency from US President Donald Trump.
“Warrants of arrest and Interpol red notices for both Tan Kim Loong and Low Taek Jho are still in effect,” the police said in a

news.headline: Income tax may fall for some salaried segments
news.summary: <p>• Those earning between Rs230,000-Rs341,000 per month likely to get some relief; maximum tax rate expected to be lowered from 35pc to 30pc<br>• Rs660bn to Rs700bn in fresh tax measures planned, including enforcement and new levies<br>• Govt targets Rs15.3tr FBR revenue in FY2026

news.headline: Nigerian migrants flee South Africa after spike in xenophobic protests
news.summary: Migrants say they are living in fear after a group gave people living illegally in South Africa a deadline to leave.

news.headline: CDA to involve PCB in revamping five grounds for first-class cricket
news.summary:
<p>ISLAMABAD: The Capital Development Authority (CDA) has decided to involve Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) for revamping cricket grounds in federal capital.</p>

news.headline: Pakistan’s trade with Central Asia faces snags
news.summary:
<p>ISLAMABAD: Pakistan’s exports to five Central Asian Countries (CACs) fell year on year by 8.62 per cent in the first 10 months of 2025-26. </p>
